metadata.description: Five Agent Skills plus a shared Python core for the EML operator from arXiv:2603.21852 — compile ordinary math into EML trees, verify witnesses against named claims with branch-cut probes, search for shorter trees, fit elementary laws from data, and numerically check identities.

plugins.name: eml-skill
